engineIntelligence.h2: Renault Lodgy Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Renault Lodgy in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Renault Lodgy K9K engine - diesel 1.5L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing belt failure - belt snap after 90k miles if service intervals missed, causing catastrophic engine damage.
EGR valve clogging - carbon buildup restricts flow, triggering limp mode and loss of power on high-mileage units.
Injector wear - high-pressure injectors degrade from 80k miles, causing rough idle and misfires.

cards.altText: Renault Lodgy K4M engine - petrol 1.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing belt tensioner failure - belt slip on high-mileage units if service intervals are missed.
Water pump leakage - coolant loss and overheating risk after 70k miles on original units.

cards.altText: Renault Lodgy K9K Euro 6 engine - diesel 1.5L replacement UK
knownFailures: DPF regeneration failure - clogged filter triggers limp mode on short-journey vehicles.
AdBlue system faults - injector blockages and sensor failures on late-model Euro 6d units.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £1,250-£2,650 (supply only) Estimated from comparable K9K Euro 6 units - actual quotes may vary.

commonProblems.h2: Renault Lodgy Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Renault Lodgy's 1.5 dCi K9K diesel dominates UK replacement enquiries, with timing belt neglect and EGR/DPF issues driving most failures. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty. Use this decision tool to compare repair vs replacement costs for your Lodgy.

problems.h4: Timing Belt Failure - Why Renault Lodgy Engines Fail Prematurely
problems.typicalFailureMileage: 80,000-110,000 miles if belt not replaced per schedule
problems.rootCause: Timing belt degradation from age/mileage; if it snaps, pistons strike valves causing catastrophic engine damage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New timing belt kit, tensioner, water pump, labour
repairOptions.longevity: Prevents catastrophic failure; recommended at 90k miles or 6 years

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K9K engine with new belt kit, bench-tested, upgraded components
repairOptions.longevity: Restores like-new reliability; 12-month unlimited mileage warranty included

problems.recommendation: If your Lodgy's timing belt is due or overdue, preventative replacement is far cheaper than engine replacement. But if the belt has already snapped, a rebuilt K9K engine from our network offers better long-term value than a dealer repair on a budget MPV.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt K9K engine prices for your Renault Lodgy

problems.h4: EGR Valve Failure - Loss of Power on Renault Lodgy dCi Engines
problems.rootCause: Carbon buildup clogs EGR valve and cooler, restricting exhaust recirculation and triggering limp mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: EGR valve removal, cleaning or replacement, ECU reset, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Restores power temporarily; may recur if driving pattern unchanged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt K9K with cleaned/upgraded EGR system, new injectors, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Permanent solution; addresses root cause with upgraded components

problems.recommendation: For a Lodgy used mainly for short trips, EGR cleaning may suffice short-term. But if power loss recurs or the engine has high mileage, a rebuilt unit with upgraded EGR components offers better value and peace of mind.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Renault Lodgy EGR-fix rebuilt engines

problems.h4: DPF Regeneration Failure - Limp Mode on Renault Lodgy Euro 6
problems.affectedModels: Renault Lodgy Dynamique/Laureate Euro 6 dCi (2016-2020, K9K 692/698)
problems.rootCause: Incomplete DPF regeneration cycles cause soot buildup; eventually filter clogs, triggering limp mode and warning lights.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: DPF removal, professional cleaning or replacement, forced regeneration, ECU reset
repairOptions.longevity: May restore function; risk of recurrence if driving pattern unchanged

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt Euro 6 K9K with new/reconditioned DPF, AdBlue system check, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: ULEZ-compliant solution; addresses DPF, EGR, turbo in one rebuilt unit

problems.recommendation: If your Lodgy is used for urban commuting, DPF issues will likely recur. For Euro 6 Lodgy owners facing ULEZ charges, a rebuilt Euro 6 K9K engine with warranty is often more cost-effective than repeated DPF repairs.
problems.cta: Compare Euro 6 Renault Lodgy engine prices now

problems.h4: Injector Failure - Rough Running on Renault Lodgy dCi
problems.rootCause: High-pressure diesel injectors wear, causing poor atomisation, misfires, rough idle and increased fuel consumption.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove old injectors, fit new/reconditioned units, code to ECU, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Restores performance; other injectors may fail soon after on high-mileage engines

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt K9K with new injectors, updated calibration, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Comprehensive solution; addresses injectors plus other wear items in one rebuild

problems.recommendation: If only one injector has failed on a lower-mileage Lodgy, replacement may suffice. But on engines over 90k miles, multiple injector failures are likely - a rebuilt engine offers better long-term value.
problems.cta: Find rebuilt K9K engines with new injectors for your Lodgy

problems.h4: Turbocharger Failure - Blue Smoke on Renault Lodgy dCi
problems.rootCause: Turbo bearing wear or oil starvation causes seal failure, allowing oil into exhaust (blue smoke) and loss of boost.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove old turbo, fit new/reconditioned unit, oil feed check, road test
repairOptions.longevity: Restores boost; underlying oil system issues may cause repeat failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Rebuilt K9K with balanced turbo, new oil pump, full warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses turbo plus related wear; best value for high-mileage performance diesels

problems.recommendation: Turbo failure often indicates broader oil system wear on high-mileage K9K engines. For a 110hp Lodgy used for towing or loaded family trips, a rebuilt engine with warranty offers better peace of mind than turbo-only repair.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 110hp K9K engine prices for your Lodgy

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Renault Lodgy
finalCta.paragraph: The Renault Lodgy's K9K diesel is robust when serviced, but timing belt neglect, EGR/DPF issues and injector wear drive most replacement enquiries. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Renault Lodgy specialists - every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare prices and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Renault Lodgy Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Renault Lodgy and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Renault Lodgy Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Renault Lodgy is listed below, with compatible engine codes, years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Renault Lodgy 1.5L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.5L dCi K9K diesel powered virtually every Renault Lodgy sold in the UK, from entry-level Authentique to top-spec Laureate. This compact, turbocharged unit delivered strong fuel economy and adequate torque for the 7-seat MPV, but requires strict adherence to timing belt service intervals to avoid catastrophic failure.
commonFailurePoints: DPF regeneration issues on short-journey vehicles

commonFailurePoints: ignition coil failure on high-mileage units

engineYears.h2: Renault Lodgy Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This timeline covers all major engine changes across the Renault Lodgy's UK production run (2012-2022), organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Lodgy launched with Euro 5 K9K diesel engines, establishing the 1.5L dCi as the dominant powertrain for this budget MPV.
keyChanges: Renault Lodgy enters UK market as 5/7-seat family MPV
K9K 612 (75hp) and K9K 628 (90hp) diesel engines standard
K4M 690 1.6L petrol offered as ULEZ-friendly alternative
knownFor: Strong value proposition for large families
Timing belt service critical from day one
Early units show EGR clogging on urban-use examples
years.cta: Get quotes for 2012-2013 Renault Lodgy replacement engines
years.ticker: Lodgy Authentique engine replacement • K9K 612 timing belt fix • Expression dCi 90 engine cost

years.description: The higher-output 110hp K9K 646 joined the range for Dynamique trim, adding torque for loaded family journeys.
keyChanges: Euro 5 emissions standard maintained across diesel range
Minor interior updates and equipment revisions
knownFor: 110hp variant popular with towing families
Turbo-related failures emerge on high-mileage 110hp units
Petrol variants gain interest from London buyers pre-ULEZ
years.ticker: Dynamique dCi 110 turbo replacement • Lodgy 110hp engine cost • K9K 646 rebuilt engine UK

years.description: Euro 6 emissions compliance arrived with updated K9K 692 engines, essential for London ULEZ and clean air zone access.
keyChanges: Euro 6 compliant K9K 692/698 engines replace Euro 5 units
AdBlue system introduced on late-production models
Minor facelift updates to exterior styling and equipment
knownFor: ULEZ exemption drives demand for Euro 6 Lodgy
DPF and AdBlue system faults emerge on short-journey vehicles
Petrol production ends; diesel dominates late-model range
years.cta: Get quotes for Euro 6 Renault Lodgy engine replacement
years.ticker: Lodgy Euro 6 engine ULEZ • K9K 692 AdBlue fault fix • Laureate dCi 110 replacement cost

years.description: Final UK-spec Lodgy models featured refined K9K 698 engines with improved emissions calibration and reliability updates.
keyChanges: K9K 698 with refined ECU mapping for Euro 6d compliance
Enhanced warranty coverage on late-production units
Gradual wind-down of UK sales as Renault focuses on other MPVs
knownFor: Most reliable K9K variants with lessons from earlier failures incorporated
Strong residual demand from taxi/fleet buyers for durability
Late-model units command premium in used engine market
years.cta: Compare late-model Renault Lodgy engine prices
years.ticker: Lodgy 2019 engine replacement • K9K 698 rebuilt cost • Late-model dCi 110 supply UK

years.description: After UK sales ended, Lodgy engine support continues via import channels and specialist rebuilders for remaining vehicles.
keyChanges: UK sales conclude; remaining demand met via European imports
K9K 876/886 codes appear on import-spec late-production models
Specialist rebuilders focus on K9K family for ongoing support
knownFor: Import engines require careful compatibility verification
Specialist rebuilders offer best value for rare late codes
Strong aftermarket support ensures ongoing parts availability
years.cta: Enquire about import-spec Renault Lodgy engine availability

faq.h2: Renault Lodgy Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Renault Lodgy engine replacement cost UK?
items.answer: A rebuilt Renault Lodgy engine typically costs £995-£2,450 supply-only, depending on engine code and variant. Enter your registration for an instant tailored quote from UK specialists.
keyPoints: K9K 1.5 dCi rebuilt engines range from £995-£2,450 supply-only
K4M 1.6 petrol rebuilt units typically £850-£1,950 supply-only
Supply & fit adds approximately £400-£700 labour cost
Prices include minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Get instant Renault Lodgy engine quote with your reg

items.question: What is the most reliable engine for Renault Lodgy?
items.answer: The K9K 628 90hp diesel offers the best balance of reliability and running costs for most Lodgy owners when serviced properly.
keyPoints: K9K 628 90hp has fewer turbo/AdBlue complexities than 110hp variants
Strict timing belt replacement at 90k miles prevents catastrophic failure
Regular EGR cleaning extends life on urban-use vehicles
K4M petrol avoids diesel emissions issues but has lower torque
items.cta: Compare rebuilt K9K 628 engine prices for your Lodgy

items.question: Can I fit a different K9K engine code in my Renault Lodgy?
items.answer: K9K engine swaps are possible but require ECU recoding and compatibility checks - use our verification tool before ordering.
keyPoints: All K9K 1.5 dCi engines share basic architecture and mounts
ECU calibration must match engine code and vehicle spec
Euro 5 to Euro 6 swaps need emissions system compatibility checks
Specialist suppliers can advise on cross-code fitment
items.cta: Check K9K engine compatibility for your Renault Lodgy

items.question: How long does a Renault Lodgy engine replacement take?
items.answer: Supply-only engines can be dispatched next-day; supply & fit typically takes 1-3 days depending on garage availability.
keyPoints: Most rebuilt K9K engines available for next-day dispatch UK-wide
Supply & fit appointments usually scheduled within 48-72 hours
Complex Euro 6/AdBlue units may require longer calibration time
Many network garages offer collection/delivery options
items.cta: Book Renault Lodgy engine supply & fit near you

items.question: What warranty comes with a reconditioned Renault Lodgy engine?
items.answer: Reconditioned Renault Lodgy engines include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK specialists.
keyPoints: 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard on rebuilt/recon units
Used engines typically carry 3-month minimum warranty
Warranty covers parts and labour if fitted by network garage
Always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before ordering
items.cta: Compare warranty terms on Renault Lodgy engine quotes

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine in a Renault Lodgy?
items.answer: If repair costs exceed 50% of your Lodgy's value, a rebuilt engine with warranty often offers better long-term value than scrapping.
keyPoints: Use our repair vs replace calculator for personalised advice
Rebuilt K9K engines restore like-new reliability at fraction of new-car cost
Lodgy's practicality and low running costs justify engine investment
Consider ULEZ compliance when choosing Euro 5 vs Euro 6 replacement
items.cta: Use our value calculator for your Renault Lodgy engine decision

items.question: How do I find my Renault Lodgy engine code?
items.answer: Your Lodgy's engine code is on the VIN plate under the bonnet, in the service book, or on the V5C registration document.
keyPoints: Engine code appears in section D.2 on your V5C logbook
VIN plate under bonnet shows engine code near chassis number
Service invoices and MOT certificates often list engine code
Enter your registration above for instant DVLA code verification
items.cta: Verify your Renault Lodgy engine code instantly with reg lookup

items.question: What causes Renault Lodgy engine failure?
items.answer: Timing belt neglect is the #1 cause of catastrophic Lodgy engine failure; EGR/DPF issues drive most non-catastrophic replacements.
keyPoints: Timing belt snap after 90k miles causes piston/valve collision damage
EGR valve clogging triggers limp mode on urban-use vehicles
DPF regeneration failure affects short-journey Euro 6 models
Injector wear and turbo seal failure common on high-mileage K9K units
items.cta: Find rebuilt Lodgy engines addressing your specific failure

items.question: Can I get finance for a Renault Lodgy engine replacement?
items.answer: Many network suppliers offer finance options from £49/month subject to status - check eligibility during your quote request.
keyPoints: Finance options available on rebuilt engines over £1,000
Typical terms: 12-36 months, subject to credit check
Some suppliers offer 0% introductory periods for prompt payment
Finance applications processed during quote comparison stage
items.cta: Check finance eligibility when comparing Renault Lodgy engine quotes

items.question: Do you supply engines for Renault Lodgy 7-seat models?
items.answer: Yes - all K9K and K4M engines are compatible with both 5-seat and 7-seat Lodgy configurations.
keyPoints: Engine mounting points identical across 5-seat and 7-seat variants
Confirm seating configuration when ordering to ensure correct ancillaries
7-seat models may have different bracket placements - verify before fitting
Enter registration for instant compatibility confirmation
